title: ITALY enforcement action against Comune di Velletri (2,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on the Commune di Velletri. The controller provided a cemetery app containing data on deceased persons for use within the app. The app combined public and institutional cemetery information, such as names and places of burial, with socia...
